generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our allies to keep America safe. But have you seen how much we're spending on NATO while our own infrastructure crumbles? It's time we focus on securing our own borders and communities first. Our daughters deserve better. #AmericaFirst #NationalSecurity
